subject: Your boarding pass
html_body:
Your boarding pass

Your boarding pass
Dear Test Passenger,
The boarding pass is attached.

If you travel only with hand baggage you can go directly to the gate and show your online check-in to board the plane.

If you need to check baggage you can go to the dedicated drop-off area, where available, or to the Check-in desks.

Your flight
FCO LIN
21:00 - 13 Apr 2025 AZ2058 22:10 - 13 Apr 2025
ROME Operated by ITA Airways MILAN
Booking code Terminal Boarding Gate
KKEZ2E 1 20:30
Passenger /Adult Ticket No. Zone / Seat
Test Passenger +1 555 000 0000 5 /5C
Important information
You can carry 1 hand baggage weighing up to 8 kg and not exceeding: 55cm in height, 35cm in width, 25cm in thickness (including handles and wheels). This information is valid for flights operated by ITA Airways (on the flights operated by the partner companies the rules of the airline operating the flight are applied)ITA Airways reserves the right to collect your hand baggage for boarding in the hold in the event of a high occupancy rateVisit the website www.ita-airways.com to know the limits of size, weight, amount of baggage to be loaded and the time of presentation at the airportTo cancel check-in, go to the homepage of our siteITA Airways reserves the right to change the assigned seat, in case of aircraft change or technical requirementsWARNINGFor many flight destinations there are specific restrictions on the transportation of specific items, equipment or devices. In certain instances carrying these items in a country may result in the application of sanctions. For further information we kindly invite passengers to verify with the country’s consular authorities the existence of any possible restriction before departure.
Digital newsstand
For free access to the ITA Airways digital newsstand please click here. The downloading of the contents is unlimited and the service is available for 58 hours from the time of your first access. Happy reading!

Be digital be sustainable! 
Help us respect the environment, don't print, use our digital channels.


TEST PASSENGER

TEST PASSENGER - For flights that include a route in connection with the TRAIN identified by code 9B, it will be necessary to check in for the train route, starting from 72 hours before departure, on the website https://check-in.accesrail.com/#/step1. For flights that include a route in connection with the TRAIN identified by code W2 (all German stations), you can check-in for the train route after purchasing the ticket, up to the day of departure of the train, on the website https://www.rail-checkin.com/#/login  For flights that include a route in connection with the TRAIN identified by code I6, it is not necessary to check in for the train route.For complete information, see https://www.ita-airways.com/it_it/aereo-treno.html

TEST PASSENGER 97, ROME (RM) - TEST PASSENGER 00187

P.I. tax number +1 555 000 0000 REA number RM - 1622937
